1.title: E-commerce Operational Supervisor
1.overview: E-commerce specialist with expertise in Amazon, eBay, TikTok and, Shopee operations. Manages everything from product listings to campaign execution, ensuring brands stand out in crowded marketplaces. Collaborates with creative teams to produce platform-optimized content that drives traffic and sales.
responsibilities: Led international client meetings traveling cities to consult with key stakeholders, align strategies, and strengthen business partnerships
Drove 30% increased sales through targeted campaign optimization and data-driven decision-making
Elevated visual content quality across worldwideplatforms by enforcing updated creative guidelines and design consistency
Analyzed campaign data to identify trends, refine strategies, and maximize ROI for multiple e-commerce clients
Resolved internal scheduling conflicts by implementing a structured content calendar, improving team efficiency and reducing campaign delays
Created a system of internal KPIs to monitor individual and team performance, resulting in better alignment with client goals and faster project completion

achievements.label: Sales Increase
achievements.description: Drove sales growth through targeted campaign optimization across client portfolio

achievements.label: Creative Consistency
achievements.description: Elevated visual content quality across worldwide platforms

achievements.label: Handled Brands
achievements.description: Reduced campaign delays through structured content calendar implementation

2.title: Senior Streamer
2.overview: Generated over Rp 200 million (~$11,860 USD) in sales during a single 5-hour TikTok live stream through high-energy hosting and strategic product promotion while serving as team mentor for new hires.
responsibilities: Hosted daily 5-hour TikTok live streams showcasing fashion products to thousands of concurrent viewers
Served as team mentor, guiding new hires through live hosting techniques, audience engagement strategies, and e-commerce best practices
Generated over Rp 820 million (~$48,600 USD) in sales through targeted Shopee live stream campaigns, data analysis, and continuous optimization
Appeared in product catalog content and campaign visuals, helping establish a consistent and relatable brand image
Coordinated with inventory and logistics teams for real-time product availability during live events

achievements.label: Peak Single Stream
achievements.description: Generated ~$11,860 USD in sales during one 5-hour TikTok live session

achievements.label: Total Shopee Sales
achievements.description: Cumulative sales through targeted live stream campaigns (~$48,600 USD)

achievements.label: Mentored Hosts
achievements.description: Successfully trained new streaming talent on hosting techniques and engagement

3.title: Junior Streamer
3.overview: Hosted live streaming sessions for a leading shoe brand, building foundational skills in live commerce and consistently growing account traffic within 2 months of onboarding.
responsibilities: Conducted regular live streaming sessions showcasing footwear products
Engaged with viewers to answer product questions and drive conversions
Executed regular live streams to showcase products, engage audiences, and reinforce brand identity
Coordinated with operations team for order processing and fulfillment during live sessions

achievements.label: Traffic Growth
achievements.description: Consistently increased account engagement and follower count from onboarding

achievements.label: Stream Cadence
achievements.description: Maintained regular streaming schedule for brand consistency

4.title: Store Clerk
4.overview: Managed daily retail operations including customer service, cashier duties, and handling of transactions in an accurate and timely manner while maintaining store cleanliness and operational standards.
responsibilities: Executed daily store operations, including customer service, cashier duties, and handling of transactions in an accurate and timely manner
Monitored inventory levels, assisted in stock receiving, and coordinated with the back office to prevent stockouts and overstock
Maintained cleanliness, orderliness, and compliance with store operational procedures to support a safe and comfortable shopping environment

achievements.label: Customer
achievements.description: Maintained consistent service quality through attentive customer care

achievements.label: Stock Issues
achievements.description: Prevented stockouts through proactive inventory monitoring

5.title: Marketing & Sponsorship Staff
5.overview: Supported planning and execution of marketing activities and promotional campaigns for L.A Soundsation events to increase brand visibility and audience engagement while managing sponsor relationships.
responsibilities: Supported planning and execution of marketing activities and promotional campaigns for L.A Soundsation events to increase brand visibility and audience engagement
Coordinated sponsorship-related tasks, including identification of potential sponsors, preparation of basic sponsor materials, and support during negotiations and follow-ups
Assisted in managing on-site event marketing and sponsorship activations, ensuring sponsor branding requirements and agreed deliverables were met
Collaborated with internal teams and external partners to gather content, maintain marketing timelines, and contribute to post-event reporting on sponsorship and marketing outcomes

achievements.label: Sponsor Retention
achievements.description: Successfully maintained and renewed key sponsor partnerships

achievements.label: Events Supported
achievements.description: Contributed to marketing and sponsorship for multiple events
